element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Improved ease of execution vs. DuckTales 1
New mechanic expanding cane utility beyond jumping
Enables access to larger platforming challenges
Unlocks hidden areas and optional content in revisited levels
Enables collection of map pieces and optional treasure
Optional objective; unlocks sixth stage if all collected

typical_relief_triggers: Purchase of recovery items at shop
Revisiting completed levels with less pressure
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Non-linear level selection allows player-controlled tension management; tension escalates as players progress toward map completion and final stage

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Off-path treasure chests containing map pieces; hidden areas accessible only with cane upgrades
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Map pieces hidden in treasure chests; optional sixth stage triggered by full map collection; bad ending path if player has no money

difficulty_curve.early_game: Accessible; improved cane jump mechanics reduce execution barrier vs. original; early stages introduce basic interactions with objects
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Moderate; new mechanics (hooks, rafts, springy flowers) layered in; water traversal and puzzle-solving increase in complexity
difficulty_curve.late_game: Escalating; boss encounters become more demanding; D-1000 final confrontation uses shapeshifting unpredictability; optional treasure hunt adds exploration complexity
notable_spikes: Glomgold ransom sequence forcing treasure trade

notable_level_patterns.description: Player can freely choose which of 5 main stages to complete in any order (Mega Man series design). Each stage is geographically distinct (Niagara Falls, Bermuda Triangle pirate ship, Mu, Egypt, Scotland) with unique treasure and boss
Completed stages can be revisited to collect money and items; cane upgrades from Gyro Gearloose progressively unlock new areas on replay, encouraging backtracking without requiring it
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Any main stage after first completion

notable_level_patterns.description: Each stage contains a hidden map piece in a treasure chest; collecting all 5 pieces unlocks the optional sixth stage with the final lost treasure; money accumulation creates secondary progression track (affects ending)
Stages involving water (Bermuda Triangle, potentially Mu) introduce raft mechanics and water-specific platforming challenges distinct from land-based stages
